issue_summary: Added ModelSpecificationException and changed UpdatingRegression impls to use it. JIRA: .
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Adds multiplier observations to the model
     * @param x observations on the regressors
     * @param y observations on the regressand
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Adds multiple observations to the model
     * @param x observations on the regressors
     * @param y observations on the regressand
     * @throws ModelSpecificationException if {@code x} is not rectangular, does not match
     * the length of {@code y} or does not contain sufficient data to estimate the model
     */
